title: BEM-859 protocol file
objective:
Create file governance/protocols/BEM859_MULTIAGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL_OPERATOR_REMARKS_DRAFT.md with content # BEM-859 MULTIAGENT DEVELOPMENT PROTOCOL DRAFT
Status: draft_for_curator_routed_internal_audit

Universal model: from one Worker contour to branched hierarchy and ERP-like business management.
Hierarchy: Operator -> General Director contour -> Director contours -> Curators -> Worker contours -> role links.
Director is not one agent. Director is a contour of role links: Curator, Auditor, Analyst, Executor, Monitor or equivalents.
Worker contour includes Curator. Worker contours exchange data at their level and send cleaned data to Curator. Curators exchange cleaned data and send it to Director. Directors exchange cleaned data and send it to General Director contour.
Domain Director and Worker roles are customer/project specific.
Target repos: control-plane ai-devops-system plus product repos. Product repos connect through product registry with repo id/url, owner contour, permissions, routing rules, trace_id mapping, CI dispatch contract, audit trail, result backflow to Runtime Registry v2. Product logic must not pollute control-plane.
Controls: Fast lane for low-risk reversible routine. Audit lane for architecture workflows rights money legal risks. Operator lane for strategy director conflicts irreversible or high-risk actions.
GPT and Claude are peer auditors. Operator is the only senior subject. Handoff to Claude only through Curator. Audit mailbox is main coordination channel. Telegram is only operator gate/notification.
Source of truth: AGENT_CONTEXT.md for current state; governance/agreements/final and governance/protocols for agreed protocols; Runtime Registry v2 for runtime state and audit trail. roadmap_state.json and GPT_HANDOFF.md are not authoritative without AGENT_CONTEXT.md.
No issue comments.
